name: Police Emergency
description: National police emergency helpline. Available 24/7 across all states.

name: Fire Brigade
description: Fire rescue and emergency services. Covers structural fires, gas leaks and rescues.

name: Ambulance / Medical
description: National ambulance service. Free emergency medical transport for critical patients.

name: National Emergency
description: Single unified emergency number for Police, Fire and Ambulance. Works pan-India.

name: Disaster Management
description: NDRF helpline for floods, earthquakes, cyclones and mass casualty events.

name: Snake Bite / Poison
description: Poison control and anti-venom helpline. Also handles dog bite, insect sting, scorpion sting, chemical exposure.

name: Dog Bite / Animal Attack
description: Animal control and anti-rabies helpline. Report stray animals and animal attacks. Anti-rabies vaccination guidance.

name: Women Safety Helpline
description: Dedicated helpline for women in distress. Available 24/7. Immediate police response guaranteed.

name: Child Helpline
description: CHILDLINE India — for children in danger, abuse, lost children or child labour situations.

name: Road Accident Emergency
description: National Highway accident helpline. Immediate ambulance dispatch for road accident victims.

name: Suicide Prevention
description: Mental health and suicide crisis helpline. Confidential support available every day.

name: Coastal / Sea Rescue
description: Indian Coast Guard emergency for drowning, sea accidents, and coastal disasters.

name: Electricity Emergency
description: Electrical faults, live wire accidents, transformer fires and power outages.

name: Gas Leak Emergency
description: Petroleum and natural gas leak response. Covers PNG, LPG and CNG line ruptures.

name: Senior Citizen Helpline
description: Elder care and elder abuse helpline managed by Ministry of Social Justice.

name: Flood Relief Helpline
description: National Flood Relief Helpline for emergency assistance during floods.
